topic: Claude Code vs GitHub Copilot 2026: Terminal Agent vs IDE Assistant

competitors.title: Claude Code vs GitHub Copilot 2026: SWE-bench, Pricing [Tested]
key_points: Claude Code scores 80.8% on SWE-bench Verified vs GitHub Copilot's 72.5%
Claude Code offers up to 1M token context window vs Copilot's 32K-128K
Claude Code Pro costs $20/month vs GitHub Copilot Individual at $10/month
Claude Code excels at autonomous multi-file refactoring, Copilot excels at inline completions
Claude Code's agentic architecture allows hours-long autonomous sessions
GitHub Copilot integrates with 10+ IDEs and has a free tier (2,000 completions + 50 chats/month)
84% of professional developers use or plan to use AI coding tools (Stack Overflow 2025 Survey)

competitors.title: Claude Code vs GitHub Copilot: An Honest Comparison (2026)
key_points: Claude Code is terminal-first agentic tool, GitHub Copilot is IDE-integrated assistant
Claude Code lacks inline completions; GitHub Copilot offers fast inline suggestions (100-300ms latency)
Claude Code context window: 200K tokens standard, up to 1M with Opus 4.6
GitHub Copilot supports multi-model switching (Claude, GPT, Gemini, others)
Claude Code Pro $20/month; GitHub Copilot free tier and Pro $10/month
Claude Code excels at large-scale refactoring, autonomous task execution, complex architectural reasoning
GitHub Copilot wins for developers wanting AI suggestions as they type, teams embedded in GitHub ecosystem

competitors.title: Claude Code vs GitHub Copilot vs Cursor (2026): Honest Comparison
key_points: Claude Code is most agentic, works in terminal, IDE, desktop, Slack
GitHub Copilot has widest IDE support (10+ IDEs) and model flexibility
Cursor is AI-native IDE with deepest integration but requires switching editors
Pricing: GitHub Copilot $10/month (Pro), Claude Code $17-20/month, Cursor $20/month
Enterprise: Claude Code HIPAA-ready, GitHub Copilot IP indemnity, Cursor SOC 2 Type 2
Recommendation: Claude Code for autonomous work, GitHub Copilot for GitHub-centric teams, Cursor for AI-native IDE experience
Many developers use both tools complementarily (Copilot for inline, Claude Code for complex tasks)

Claude Code context window: up to 1M tokens (Opus 4.6) vs GitHub Copilot's 32K-128K

84% of professional developers use or plan to use AI coding tools
GitHub Copilot free tier offers 2,000 completions + 50 premium requests/month
Claude Code can autonomously refactor across 30+ files; Copilot agent mode limited to 10+ file changes
Claude Code Max tiers cost $100-200/month for power users; GitHub Copilot Pro+ $39/month
Average development team uses four different AI tools (2026 survey by Sonar)
